properties.remark: OVER 100 BIG OAK TREES WERE BLOWN DOWN. THERE WERE 30-40 LARGE OAK TREES BROKEN OFF AT THE BASE. ALSO... TOP HALF OF 100-200 OAK TREES WERE STRIPPED. A WINDMILL AND POWER LINES WERE BLOWN OVER .

TORNADO STRAT TIME 7 PM/END TIME 705 PM. A NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE DAMAGE SURVEY TEAM DETERMINED AN EF-2 TORNADO TOUCH DOWN 8 MILES SOUTHEAST OF BRADY. THE MAXIMUM WIND SPEED WAS 115 MPH AND THE PATH LENGTH WAS 2.5 MILES. THE MAXIMUM WIDTH OF THE TORNADO WAS 450 YARDS. NUMEROUS TREES WERE UPROOTED OR HAD TRUNKS SNAPPED OFF.
